home.title: Speaking Studio
home.body: Guided speaking practice, assessment, and review.
home.runtime_setup_body: Configure Whisper and at least one inference connection before using the full runtime flow.
home.primary_body: Use the guided flow for setup, speaking, and review. Management pages stay separate.
home.secondary_body: History, library, and settings stay available without competing with the core task.

runtime_setup.title: Runtime setup
runtime_setup.body: Prepare Whisper and the first inference connection before using the rest of the app shell.
runtime_setup.current_connection_ready: An active connection is already configured. Retest it or replace it below.
runtime_setup.last_test_failed: Last connection test failed. Details are shown in Section D below.
runtime_setup.whisper_guidance: Guidance: tiny is fastest, small is a balanced default, and large-v3 is the best quality option.

ollama_local.label: Ollama local
ollama_local.hint: Use an installed Ollama model such as `llama3` or `llama3.2:3b`.

ollama_cloud.label: Ollama cloud
ollama_cloud.hint: Use a model id exposed by your remote Ollama endpoint.

lmstudio_local.label: LM Studio local
lmstudio_local.hint: Use the loaded LM Studio model id, for example `qwen2.5`.

openrouter.label: OpenRouter
openrouter.hint: Use a routed OpenRouter model id such as `google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview`.

openai_compatible.label: Generic OpenAI-compatible
openai_compatible.hint: Enter the model id your OpenAI-compatible endpoint exposes.

runtime_setup.ollama_cloud_note: Cloud endpoints can expose different models and auth behavior than local Ollama.
runtime_setup.openai_compatible_note: Use this for custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints when none of the named presets fit.
runtime_setup.base_url_help: Leave blank to use the provider's suggested base URL.
runtime_setup.detected_local_models_empty: No models were returned by {endpoint}. You can still enter one manually.
runtime_setup.detected_local_models_help: Local model discovery can populate this field from the running service.
runtime_setup.actions_body: Run a quick health check first, then a short smoke test. Saving also makes this the active connection. Test results are recommended but never block save.
runtime_setup.test_message: Health check passed at {endpoint}. Smoke test reached {base_url} with model {model}. Preview: {preview}
runtime_setup.save_success: Connection saved and set as active.
runtime_setup.save_success_session_only: Connection saved and set as active. Secret storage is running in {backend} mode.

download_status.checking_cache_detail: Looking for an already-downloaded model before contacting Hugging Face.
download_status.finalizing_detail: Verifying the cached snapshot and warming up model initialization.
download_status.ready_detail: The selected model is now cached locally.

setup.title: Prepare one speaking session
setup.body: Choose the learner, language, level, theme, and duration before recording.
setup.no_languages: No learning languages are available in the theme library yet.
setup.preview_placeholder: Choose a theme to preview the speaking brief.
setup.success_focus_title: What a strong answer should include
setup.flow_hint: Next, record one spoken response for review.
setup.custom_theme_save: Save this custom theme for reuse
setup.custom_theme_save_help: If you save it, this theme will appear in the library for {language} at {level} as {task_family}.

speak.title: Record one response
speak.body: Keep the screen focused on the prompt, the recording, and the submit action.
speak.guard_missing_setup: Complete Session Setup before opening the speaking screen.
speak.prompt_placeholder: No speaking brief is available yet.
speak.recording_body: Use the browser recorder or upload an existing file.
speak.status_missing_file: A recording was selected earlier, but the audio file is no longer available.
speak.status_ready: A recording is attached and ready for assessment.
speak.ingest_error: The audio could not be stored: {detail}
speak.preview_error: The recording preview could not be opened: {detail}
speak.openrouter_missing_key: OpenRouter is selected, but no API key is configured in Settings and no OPENROUTER_API_KEY is available in the environment.
speak.label: Label (optional)

review.title: Review one attempt
review.body: Keep scores, gates, coaching, and transcript together after submission.
review.guard_missing_review: Submit a speaking attempt before opening the review screen.
review.status_review: Manual review is recommended for this attempt.
review.summary_placeholder: No coaching summary is available yet.
review.progress_unavailable: Progress appears here once there is a comparable earlier attempt for the same speaker and task family.
review.notes_placeholder: No notes were saved for this attempt.

history.title: History and trends
history.body: Past work belongs here, not on the active speaking screen.
history.scope_all: Showing {count} saved runs across all speakers.
history.scope_current_speaker_language: Showing {count} saved runs for speaker {speaker} in {language}.
history.scope_all_language: Showing {count} saved runs across all speakers in {language}.
history.trends_not_enough: Add at least two saved attempts to unlock trend charts.
history.task_family_empty: No task-family breakdown is available yet.
history.attempts_jump_hint: Jump straight into one of the latest saved reviews, or choose any saved attempt.
history.details_unavailable: No saved detail payload is available yet for these history rows.
history.details_error: The saved report for this attempt could not be loaded.
history.error_loading: History could not be loaded right now.
history.empty: No history rows are available yet.
history.empty_filtered: No history rows match the current speaker/language filters.

guide.title: How scoring works
guide.body: Use this page to understand the score cards, gates, bands, and the provisional CEFR estimate.
guide.summary_body: Each saved attempt mixes one precise decimal score, one simplified band, a rule-based subscore, a rubric subscore, and pass or open validation gates.
guide.card_overall_body: Main 1-5 result. This is the most useful number when you compare attempts over time.
guide.card_band_body: Quick whole-number bucket derived from the final score. It is not a separate rubric.
guide.card_deterministic_body: Rule-based score built from pace, pauses, fillers, cohesion markers, and structural complexity.
guide.card_rubric_body: Average of fluency, cohesion, accuracy, range, and overall impression.
guide.card_gates_body: Checks that can mark a result as unstable. A failed theme gate also caps the final score.
guide.formula_hybrid: When a rubric is available: {deterministic_weight}% deterministic + {rubric_weight}% rubric.
guide.formula_deterministic_only: When the rubric is unavailable: the final score falls back to the deterministic score only.
guide.formula_topic_cap: If the theme gate fails, the final score is capped at {cap}.
guide.formula_decimal: The app keeps the decimal score on a {min_score}-{max_score} scale for precision. The band is only a simplified bucket.
guide.deterministic_body: These weighted signals feed the rule-based subscore.
guide.det_target_pause: Lower is better up to ceiling {ceiling}.
guide.det_target_filler: Lower is better up to ceiling {ceiling}.
guide.det_target_cohesion: More discourse markers help up to target {target}.
guide.det_target_complexity: More structural complexity helps up to target {target}.
guide.rubric_body: The rubric score is the average of these five judged dimensions.
guide.rubric_desc_fluency: Smooth delivery, pace, and hesitation control.
guide.rubric_desc_cohesion: Logical structure, linking, and clear progression.
guide.rubric_desc_overall: Holistic quality after the other dimensions are considered.
guide.gates_body: These checks explain why a result may be flagged as unstable or capped.
guide.gate_rule_language_pass: Detected language should match the selected learning language.
guide.gate_rule_topic_pass: The rubric should judge the attempt as on-topic. If it fails, the final score is capped at {cap}.
guide.gate_rule_duration_pass: Speaking time should reach at least {ratio}% of the target duration.
guide.gate_rule_min_words_pass: The transcript should contain at least {count} words.
guide.cefr_body: The CEFR estimate is a separate, provisional layer built from weighted dimensions and language-specific cut scores. It is not the same as the 1-5 band.
guide.cefr_footer: Scores below the B2 cut stay at B1. Confidence drops near a cut score or when some dimensions are low-confidence.

library.title: Theme library
library.body: Theme and language management moves out of the practice flow into its own screen.
library.empty_library: No language catalog is available yet.
library.empty_language: No themes exist for this language yet.
library.manage_language: Choose an existing language or create a new one

settings.title: Settings
settings.body: UI language and provider choices stay separate from the learning task itself.
settings.api_key_cloud_optional: API key (optional for local, required for cloud)
settings.api_key_required: This provider requires a key before live assessments can run.
settings.api_key_optional: This provider can run without a key locally, but remote or protected endpoints may need one.
settings.openrouter_key_saved: A saved OpenRouter API key will be used for assessments from this app.
settings.openrouter_key_env_fallback: If this field stays empty, the app falls back to OPENROUTER_API_KEY from the shell environment.
settings.openrouter_storage_note: This key is stored locally in dashboard_prefs.json for this workspace.
settings.secret_storage_ok: Keys are stored outside dashboard_prefs.json when secure storage is available.
settings.secret_saved: The provider secret was saved via {backend}.
settings.secret_session_only: Secure storage is unavailable, so the secret is only available for this session: {detail}
settings.ollama_cloud_note: Ollama can point to the local server or to a hosted/cloud endpoint that needs an API key.
settings.lmstudio_token_note: LM Studio normally works without a token locally, but bearer auth can be enabled on the server.
settings.whisper_cached: This model is already cached locally at {path}.
settings.whisper_not_cached: This model is not cached yet and will need to be downloaded once.
settings.test_success: Connection test succeeded for {provider} via {base_url}. Reply preview: {preview}
